---
title: "Nick Lewis"
image: images/profile.png # Replace with your downloaded LinkedIn profile pic
about:
  template: jolla
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round
---

<div class="banner-container">
  <img src="images/banner.png" class="banner-image"> </div>

::: {.button-rectangle}
[GIS Portfolio](https://github.com/ntlewis1251) [Resume (PDF)](CV.pdf)
:::

**GIS Analyst / Geologist** Richmond, VA | ntompkinslew@gmail.com | (757) 667-8823  

---
